title: Your Cart
overLimitMessage: Your cart exceeds the 28g daily limit. A budtender will assist you.
copyToPhone: Copy your cart to your phone!
orderSentMessage: Please give your order number to the budtender!
budtenderCallNumber: A budtender will call your number shortly.
reminderToast: When you're done, tap Send to Budtender
sendFailed: Failed to send order — please try again.
cartExpiredSub: Kiosk carts expire after 15 minutes of inactivity.
cartShareIntro: Here's what was in the cart when you scanned. See the budtender to place your order!
overLimitShareMessage: This cart exceeds the 28g daily limit. A budtender will help you adjust your order when you visit.
cartDisclaimer: Prices and availability are subject to change.
cartDisclaimerSub: This cart is for reference only — place your order at the kiosk or with a budtender.
